# Watchdog — 2026-06-01

## Checks
- freshness: fresh — all routines ran within SLA.
- schema: fresh — every record validates.
- supersede integrity: fresh — no orphan supersedes.
- index reconciliation: stale — index counts trail the records by 2.

## Proposals
- reindex (index has drifted)

```json
{
  "date": "2026-06-01",
  "checks": [
    { "name": "freshness", "status": "fresh", "detail": "All routines ran within SLA" },
    { "name": "schema", "status": "fresh", "detail": "Every record validates" },
    { "name": "supersede-integrity", "status": "fresh", "detail": "No orphan supersedes" },
    { "name": "index-reconciliation", "status": "error", "detail": "index.yaml counts trail records by 2" }
  ],
  "proposals": [
    { "op": "reindex" }
  ]
}
```
